typography_goal: smaller, calmer, more elegant, modern, readable, and less Dracula-first

nav_desktop.before: 0.7rem uppercase with high tracking and Dracula CTA
nav_desktop.after: 0.7rem uppercase retained for compact premium header; CTA changed to Browse Library

hero_eyebrow.before: The Earnalism Digital Library above Dracula-led launch copy
hero_eyebrow.after: The Earnalism Digital Library above neutral Bengali + English editorial headline

hero_headline.before: Dracula-led title in live static shell: Begin with Dracula.
hero_headline.after: A calm digital reading room for timeless Bengali and English literature.
hero_headline.after_css: font-serif-display text-[2.02rem] sm:text-[2.2rem] md:text-[2.76rem] lg:text-[3.24rem] xl:text-[3.38rem] leading-[1.04]

hero_subtitle.before: Controlled launch copy centered on one approved classic.
hero_subtitle.after: Short release-safe library ambience copy with Bengali reader-only and English reading availability.

hero_ctas.before: Read Chapter 1 Free, Start Dracula, Get 7-Day Reading Pass
hero_ctas.after: Explore the Library, Choose a Shelf

action_card_titles.before: Quality-gate board title used oversized clamp up to 5.35rem
action_card_titles.after: Curated action card titles use clamp(1.18rem, 2vw, 1.52rem); board title uses clamp(1.72rem, 3.2vw, 3.15rem)

action_card_body.after: 0.9rem calm explanatory copy with clear release state per card

shelf_headings.after: Bengali and English library framing with no broad audio overclaim

library_hero.before: The live shelf begins with Dracula.
library_hero.after: Bengali and English classics, opened with release truth.

book_detail.before: Invalid same-origin API HTML fallback could render an empty h1 in local production smoke.
book_detail.after: Invalid book payloads fail closed to Dracula fallback or unavailable state, preserving visible heading and route truth.

accessibility_notes: No text was reduced below readable body scale.
Book detail unavailable states keep visible h1 copy.
performance_notes: Removed stale Dracula hardcopy preload from public index shell.
No new libraries or heavy image assets added.
Homepage main bundle remained effectively unchanged; Lighthouse performance 98.
